title: Rose Gold 18th Birthday Decoration for Girls - Happy 18th Birthday Banner, Triangle Flag Banner, Number 18 Balloons, Foil Curtains for Party Decorations (18)
features: 18TH BIRTHDAY DECORATIONS ROSE GOLD: The 18th birthday decorations include 24pcs printed latex balloons, happy 18th birthday banner, rose gold triangle flag banner, rose gold number 18 foil balloons, crown foil balloon, champagne bottle balloon, 2pcs star balloons, 2pcs heart balloons, 18th birthday sash, happy 18th birthday cake topper, foil curtains, ribbon

18TH BIRTHDAY DECORATIONS FOR WOMEN: The rose gold birthday party decoration pack is a great value way to transform any space for a birthday celebration! The color is perfect for women's rose gold party birthday party decoration set, and happy 18th birthday cake topper, happy 18th birthday banner, and birthday sash, all-in-one kit is perfect for creating an elegant and dreamy 18th birthday
18TH BIRTHDAY BALLOONS ROSE GOLD: Made of high-quality natural latex, which is durable, not easy to explode and non-toxic. The eye-catching print could stay vibrant and bold even after inflating

UNIQUE ROSE GOLD BIRTHDAY PARTY DECORATIONS: Our party set is mainly rose gold, with unique printed pattern, happy birthday banner, bright birthday sash, cake topper, and foil balloons. Add atmosphere for 18th birthday theme party, must be the highlights impressed your guests and friends

GREAT SERVICE: These 2 banners in birthday decorations can be connected in series with ribbon. Tips: Confetti will stick to the balloon by rubbing the balloon with clothes or hair before inflating. The latex balloons are a slight smell but don't worry, these are harmless. If there is ANY fault with the set, let us know, and we'll solve your problem!
